## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Marcel's new company (Growth Acts) and align on next steps for website development and marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel is transitioning full-time to Growth Acts by Oct 1st, with plans to announce at SaaStr (Sep 11-13)](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Website development is ongoing, with a push to have a minimum viable version ready before SaaStr](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Future plans include developing a robust content platform and library of AI-powered tools](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Both parties aim to meet in person during TechCrunch Disrupt (Oct 20-30) in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Topics

### Growth Acts Business Update

  - [Marcel transitioning out of DeepGram, last official day Oct 1st (staying on as advisor)](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Rapid growth: 5 new customers and 5 new employees in the past two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Announcing Growth Acts before SaaStr conference (Sep 11-13)](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Marcel negotiating potential event space rental in San Francisco for hosting meetups/events](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Website Development Progress

  - [Current focus on minimum viable website for SaaStr announcement](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Blog/content platform included in original scope](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Need for faster feedback turnaround from Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Suggestion to use Slack for more frequent, asynchronous updates (e.g., screenshots)](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Live Figma file available for Marcel to track progress](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### Future Website Plans

  - [Develop robust content platform (blog/resource library)](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Create library of embeddable AI-powered tools](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Examples shared: URL/keyword tool, similar to AirOps and Copy.AI approaches](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Martin shared index of commonly used pages for SaaS solutions](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### Marketing and Events

  - [Marcel speaking at SaaStr (panel session on Wednesday)](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Potential for co-hosted events around TechCrunch Disrupt](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Discussion on creating marketing materials (e.g., stickers, merch) for events](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Ongoing Collaboration

  - [Considering minimum retainer for continued design support post-initial website launch](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Marcel requested info on referral credits to help mitigate short-term costs](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [Martin to propose minimum team setup for ongoing marketing support](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)

### Networking

  - [Martin spoke with Jimmy Singh, who's managing most of Growth Acts' accounts](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Plans to meet in person during TechCrunch Disrupt in San Francisco (Oct 20-30)](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

  - [Consider co-hosting events around TechCrunch Disrupt](https://fathom.video/share/eirVR9rJbRcsc1jVz2-WbiVuPHsDbz4f?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
